K. Jain Designation: Professor & Head Employee ID: 262 Qualification: Ph.D. Date of Joining: 27/01/2001 : 0731-2582673 : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile Education and Qualification: PhD Work Experience: S.No. Designation Institute Year 1 Professor SGSITS Indore till date Research Details: Research Area: (i) Microstrip patch antennas, (ii) Smart Antennas, (iii) Defected Groundstructures in microstrip antennas, (iv) Substrate integrated wave guide, (v) Frequency selected surfaces, (vi) Metamaterial application in antennas, (vii) Softcomputing techniques application in antenna design. PhD Supervision: S.No. Student Affiliation. Topic 1 Krishna kant Nayak Discipline - Electronics & Communication Engineering Research centre - UIT-RGPV, Bhopal (MP) Effective Minimization Algorithms in mm Wave MIMO Systems. 2 Mr. P.S. Rathore Discipline - Electronics & Communication Engineering Research centre - SGSITS Indore (MP) Implementation of Adaptive Digital Beam Forming and Direction of Arrival (DOA) Estimation Algorithms Using Softcomputing Techniques 3 Meena Badole Discipline - Electronics & Communication Engineering Research centre - SGSITS Indore (MP) Frequency Selective surfaces (FSS) Applications in microwaves 4 Saiyed Tazen Ali Discipline - Electronics & Communication Engineering Research centre - SGSITS Indore (MP) Optimization of Multiple Input Multiple Output (MIMO) Antennas.
